The '''''Wolden''-class shuttle''' was a model of [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] used a ''Wolden''-class shuttle during [[Operation Cobolt]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Minutes of the Planning Meeting for Operation Cobolt|book=The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook|reprint=1}}
